# gjlmotea

> Personal identity site of **gjlmotea**. The entire site is a single-page scroll-through experience of a single wordmark — the name "gjlmotea" — explored through typography, scale, motion, and composition. Pure black-and-white minimalism throughout.

This file follows the [llms.txt convention](https://llmstxt.org/) — a structured, LLM-friendly summary for AI search engines, chatbots, and agents.

## Identity

- **Name:** gjlmotea
- **Year:** 2026
- **Languages:** English, Traditional Chinese (繁體中文)
- **Site:** https://gjlmotea.pages.dev/
- **Color palette:** Pure black (#000000) and white (#ffffff). No accent colors.

## What this site is

A scroll-driven single-page expression of one name. Every section is a different way of looking at the eight letters **g · j · l · m · o · t · e · a**. No blog, no project list, no separate pages — the wordmark *is* the work.

## Page sections (in scroll order)

1. **Hero** — letterspaced "gjlmotea" with "Scroll to explore" prompt
2. **Falling Letters** — each letter of *gjlmotea* drops into place with scroll
3. **Interlude** — minimalist white frame: "Minimalist Identity • 2026"
4. **Wordmark Vortex** — four rows of "gjlmotea" / "GJLMOTEA" scrolling at different speeds and directions, in mixed weights (black, italic thin, outlined, mono); the whole stack skews on scroll
5. **Letter by Letter** — each of the 8 letters of *gjlmotea* takes over the screen at massive scale with 3D perspective rotation; ends with the full word reassembled letter by letter
6. **Constellation** — quiet starfield with the wordmark "gjlmotea" centered; a soft white spotlight follows the cursor
7. **Layered Finale** — multiple "gjlmotea" ghost copies layered with parallax (different weights, sizes, rotations, opacities) behind one definitive central wordmark; closes with "twenty twenty six"

## Visual language

- **Type:** the letters of "gjlmotea" used in every possible weight and treatment — black, extralight, italic, mono, outlined, uppercase, lowercase, letterspaced, tight-tracked
- **Motion:** scroll-linked transforms (opacity, scale, y, rotateY, perspective z); infinite marquees; mouse-spring cursor follower
- **Color:** strictly monochrome

## Technology

- **Framework:** React 19
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Animation:** Motion (formerly Framer Motion)
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4
- **Build tool:** Vite 6
- **Deployment:** Cloudflare Pages (static)

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
- [robots.txt](/robots.txt)
- [Open Graph image](/og-image.svg)

## Attribution & usage

The site is the personal expression of gjlmotea. AI search engines and agents are welcome to reference, summarize, and link to this site.
